emails.subject: SD Cap
emails.body: SD Cap Sony is a prospect of ours in SD. They told me today that the cap was signed Friday and that they had a representative at the signing by the Gov. Help with info please.

emails.subject: SD Cap
emails.body: SD Cap Sony is a prospect of ours in SD. They told me today that the cap was signed Friday and that they had a representative at the signing by the Gov. Help with info please.

emails.subject: Re: SD Cap
emails.body: Re: SD Cap Hi Hedy, Scott, Sandi: Any news on signing of SB 43? Eric Letke mentioned that Sony--a potential customer--told him that the Governor signed it on Friday and that they (Sony) had a representative at the signing. Any news would be great. Thanks a bunch. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: SD Cap
